data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Added Convert-to-Epic Path section to SKILL.md with: original ticket ID traceability, Phase 1 seeding context reference, close-after-create ordering, --reason flag requirement, open children edge case. Replaced inline Option (a) steps with delegation reference. RED marker [test_convert_section_exists] was not present in .test-index (already satisfied).
